title: NFL, Paramount discussing media deal that could mean CBS pays an extra $1 billion or more
summary: The NFL is discussing getting rid of its 2029-30 opt-out clause in exchange for an increase on TV rights that could push CBS to pay more than $3 billion a year.

title: US Drillers Add Oil, Gas Rigs As Brent Tops $100 For First Time in Years
summary: The total number of active drilling rigs for oil and gas in the United States rose this week, according to new data that Baker Hughes published on Friday, bringing the total rig count in the US to 553 this week, down 39 from this same time last year. title: Gulf oil shock deepens crisis for Asia’s petrochemicals industry
summary: Japan and South Korea exposed to shortages of key component for plastics

title: Oil price shocks create many losers, but some winners too
summary: Offsetting the higher prices, energy companies have to contend with disruption where they have people and assets

title: Why China’s renminbi push matters even if it never rivals the dollar
summary: If renminbi settlement becomes cheaper and more trade migrates, firms will have less need to generate or hold US currency
